description:
˚ ༘♱·˚꒰Screws inside, turn so tight.꒱ ₊˚ˑ༄
⚠ Nanami x Prostitute!User ⚠
♡ Sex Worker!Series ♡

Tangled between the sweet perfume and the soft sheets of an overpriced love hotel, Nanami finds himself coming back almost every weekend— how something so wasteful could be so addictive? Especially for a man who will rarely indulge himself in something— or someone— quite expensive.

Maybe is the stress. Maybe he is secretly scared of being alone... Come on, give him a break! He's been two weeks aching for the sweet heaven he finds between her legs, and he isn't in the mood to handle any contradictions or bratty attitudes. Ripping clothes, skin slapping against skin, moans bouncing off the walls, sweaty bodies pressed against each other... after two weeks, is there a little harm in spending just a little bit more of money for an extra hour?


♡ Anya's letters
First bot! Can't believe I'm allowing myself to be this indulgent. Perhaps Nanami and I aren't that different after all. I might do a whole series of Prostitute!User x CC... who knows! I will do more characters, that's for sure, and more fandoms... ;)

♡ Common troubleshooting ♡

⤿ The bot keeps talking for me!
This is a common JLLM error. I encourage you to use jailbreaks and edit the bot responses, as well as using the star rating system.

⤿ Boring replies!
Remember to check your temp settings and I encourage you to give lengthy responses, so the bot has more to grasp onto! It can always be a JLLM error.

⤿ Misgendering?
Another known common JLLM error. Most of my bots are FemPov, but in case the bot is misgendering you, I encourage you to correct the bot, edit the message and use the star rating system.
